help.title: Help
help.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for?

whatIsNostr.question: What is NOSTR and why do I need it?
whatIsNostr.answer: NOSTR is a decentralized protocol that allows you to own your identity and data. RESIN uses NOSTR to ensure your account and transactions are secure and private.

accountRecovery.question: How do I recover my account?
accountRecovery.answer: You can recover your account using your 12-word recovery phrase or your NOSTR private key. Keep these safe as they are the only way to regain access to your account.

rentToOwn.question: How does rent-to-own work?
rentToOwn.answer: Rent-to-own allows you to rent a property while building equity towards ownership. Part of your monthly payment goes towards your future ownership of the property.

listProperty.question: Can I list my property on RESIN?
listProperty.answer: Yes, property owners can list their properties on RESIN. Contact our support team to learn more about the listing process and requirements.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods are accepted?
paymentMethods.answer: RESIN currently accepts various payment methods including bank transfers and cryptocurrency. The available options may vary by region.

equityCalculation.question: How is my equity calculated?
equityCalculation.answer: Your equity is calculated based on the portion of your monthly payments that goes towards ownership, as specified in your rent-to-own agreement.

browsers.question: What browsers are supported?
browsers.answer: RESIN works best on modern browsers like Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Make sure to keep your browser updated for the best experience.

dataSecurity.question: Is my data secure?
dataSecurity.answer: Yes, RESIN uses NOSTR protocol and industry-standard encryption to protect your data. Your private keys and sensitive information never leave your device.

acceptanceOfTerms.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptanceOfTerms.content: By accessing or using RESIN, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions ("Terms"). If you do not agree to all the terms and conditions of this agreement, then you may not access the website or use any services.

descriptionOfService.title: Description of Service
descriptionOfService.content: RESIN provides an online platform for real estate transactions including the listing, marketing, and sale or long-term rental of residential properties. Our services include but are not limited to property listings, facilitating communication between buyers/renters and sellers/landlords, and providing tools for transaction management.

userEligibility.title: User Eligibility
userEligibility.content: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service. By accessing or using RESIN, you represent and warrant that you have the right, authority, and capacity to enter into this agreement and to abide by all of the terms and conditions of this agreement.

userAccounts.title: User Accounts
userAccounts.content:
Account Creation: You may need to create an account to use certain features of the service. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process and to update such information to keep it accurate, current, and complete.

Account Security: You are responsible for safeguarding the private key that you use to access the Service and for any activities or actions under your private key. RESIN cannot and will not be liable for any loss or damage from your failure to comply with this security obligation.

userConduct.title: User Conduct
userConduct.content:
You agree not to use RESIN to:
• Violate any local, state, national, or international law or regulation.
• Infringe upon or violate our intellectual property rights or the intellectual property rights of others.
• Transmit any viruses, worms, defects, Trojan horses, or any items of a destructive nature.
• Engage in any behavior that is abusive, harassing, threatening, or defamatory.

content.title: Content
content.content: User Content: You are solely responsible for the content you post on RESIN. You retain all rights in, and are solely responsible for, the User Content you post to the Service.

paymentAndFees.title: Payment and Fees
paymentAndFees.content: All fees associated with listing properties, transaction services, or any additional features are due immediately and are non-refundable unless otherwise stated. RESIN may use third-party payment processors to handle payment transactions.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.content: All real estate transactions facilitated through RESIN are subject to the terms agreed upon by the parties involved. RESIN does not act as a real estate agent, broker, or intermediary in these transactions but merely provides a platform for these activities to occur.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers and Limitation of Liability
disclaimers.content:
RESIN is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranty of any kind. We disclaim all warranties to the fullest extent permitted by law.

In no event will RESIN, its officers, directors, employees, or agents be liable to you for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend access to our Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: RESIN reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect.

contactInfo.title: Contact Information
contactInfo.content: For any questions about these Terms, please contact us at hello@daedaluslabs.io
